examples: These include UFOs as well as sightings and encounters with "nonhuman creatures" such as Bigfoot and the Loch Ness monster.
This refers to the idea that when objects trying to resemble humans aren't quite perfect, they can make viewers feel uneasy because they fall somewhere between obviously nonhuman and fully human.
Our willingness to exploit nonhuman animals is not something is based on sound moral distinctions.
Other Twitter users say that embodying nonhuman entities gives them the chance to create alter egos.
